title: Visible Unobtainium
description: Replaces the Unobtainium Ore's (from Mythic Metals fabric mod) textures with ones that are much better visible.
body:
This is a simple resource pack that replaces the Unobtainium Ore's (from [Mythic Metals](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals) fabric mod) textures with ones that are much better visible.
Tested on 1.20.1, but should work on any version that [Mythic Metals](https://modrinth.com/mod/mythicmetals/versions) is on, unless they change where the textures are located for some reason.
